articles.title: Learning User Simulators with Turing Rewards
articles.excerpt: Learning to simulate human users in interactive settings could advance the training of agent assistants, evaluation of personalization systems, research in the social sciences, and more. We instead propose {T
articles.summary: 针对现有LLM训练用户模拟器仅匹配单一真实响应的问题，提出Turing Rewards方法，通过图灵测试式奖励训练用户模拟器，使其生成更逼真、多样化的交互行为，助力智能体训练与个性化评估。

articles.title: EfficientRollout: System-Aware Self-Speculative Decoding for RL Rollouts
articles.excerpt: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become a representative post-training paradigm for LLMs, enabling strong reasoning and agentic capabilities. However, rollout generation remains a dominant latency bottleneck because autoregressive sampling decodes responses sequentially and a small number of long-tailed generations often determine completion time. Speculative decoding (SD) offers a natural way to a
articles.summary: 为缓解强化学习中rollout生成的延迟瓶颈，提出EfficientRollout，一种系统感知的自推测解码方法，利用小模型草拟、大模型验证的投机解码加速LLM推理，显著减少长尾生成耗时，提升RL训练效率。

articles.title: Physics-IQ Verified
articles.excerpt: Video generative models ( VGMs) have become a new frontier that can be used not just for video generation but for a multitude of downstream tasks, including world modeling. To advance these tasks, a good video model must understand the physical reality of the world. Evaluating this understanding is an emerging field and has led to the Physics-IQ benchmark, which quantifies this explicitly by compa
articles.summary: 针对视频生成模型的物理世界理解评估问题，验证并扩展Physics-IQ基准，通过比较模型预测与真实物理场景，量化模型对因果关系、物体属性等物理规律的掌握程度，为世界模型评估提供标准化指标。

articles.title: PAIWorld: A 3D-Consistent World Foundation Model for Robotic Manipulation
articles.excerpt: World foundation models (WFMs) are powerful simulators, yet they predominantly operate in a single-view setting and lack the multi-view 3D consistency required for robotic manipulation. While robotic systems rely on multiple cameras (egocentric, eye-to-hand, and wrist-mounted) for policy learning, current multi-view world models simply concatenate view tokens without explicit geometric reasoning.
articles.summary: 为解决现有世界基础模型缺乏多视图3D一致性的问题，提出PAIWorld，一种保持3D一致性的世界模型，显式融入几何推理，融合多视角摄像头（自我、手眼、腕部）信息，提升机器人操作策略在复杂场景中的泛化能力。

articles.title: Unified Multimodal Autoregressive Modeling with Shared Context-Visual Tokenizer is Key to Unification
articles.excerpt: Unified Multimodal Modeling aims to integrate visual understanding and generation within a single system. However, existing approaches typically rely on two disparate visual tokenizers, which splits the representation space and hinders truly unified modeling. We propose UniAR, a unified autoregressive framework where a single discrete visual tokenizer serves as the key bridge between understanding
articles.summary: 针对多模态建模中视觉理解与生成使用不同分词器导致表征分裂的问题，提出UniAR，一种统一自回归框架，采用单一离散视觉分词器作为理解与生成的共享桥梁，实现真正的多模态统一，简化系统架构并提升性能。

articles.title: Zone of Proximal Policy Optimization: Teacher in Prompts, Not Gradients
articles.excerpt: Knowledge distillation transfers a teacher's competence to a small student but is brittle in the small-student regime: forcing the student to imitate logits from a much larger teacher concentrates it on the teacher's sharpest modes, hurting generalization on benchmark families beyond the training corpus. Reinforcement learning (RL) avoids logit imitation by training on the student's own rollouts.
articles.summary: 针对知识蒸馏中小模型模仿大模型logits导致泛化下降的问题，提出近侧策略优化（ZPPO），将教师知识以prompt形式而非梯度传递，结合强化学习训练小模型自身rollouts，在保持效率的同时提升跨基准泛化能力。

articles.title: Looped World Models
articles.excerpt: Current world models face a fundamental tension: faithful long-horizon simulation demands deep computation, but deeper models are expensive to deploy and prone to compounding errors. We resolve this by introducing Looped World Models (LoopWM), which are the first looped architectures for world modelling. Our method iteratively refines latent environment states through a parameter-shared transforme
articles.summary: 为解决长程世界模型模拟中深度计算与部署成本的矛盾，提出Looped World Models（LoopWM），首个循环架构世界模型，通过参数共享的Transformer迭代细化隐状态，在不显著增加参数的情况下实现长时域精确模拟，减少累积误差。

articles.title: EgoCS-400K: An Egocentric Gameplay Dataset for World Models
articles.excerpt: The shift from video generation to interactive world modeling places new demands on data: beyond captioned videos, world models require temporally aligned video-action-language trajectories grounded in the actions, camera motion, states, and events that drive future scene changes. However, such data is difficult to obtain at scale. Web video datasets offer broad visual coverage but lack executable
articles.summary: 为满足交互式世界模型对视频-动作-语言轨迹对齐数据的需求，构建EgoCS-400K数据集，包含400K段自我中心游戏视频及其对应的动作、相机运动、状态事件标注，填补现有视频数据缺乏可执行动作的空白，支撑世界模型训练。

articles.title: LoopCoder-v2: Only Loop Once for Efficient Test-Time Computation Scaling

articles.excerpt: Interactive world models aim to simulate environment dynamics under real-time user actions. articles.title: Reinforcing Dual-Path Reasoning in Spatial Vision Language Models
articles.excerpt: Spatial VLMs have made substantial progress in geometric perception, yet complex spatial reasoning requiring multi-step inference over depth, distance, and scene relations remains challenging. articles.summary: 针对空间VLMs复杂多步推理（深度、距离、场景关系）的难点，提出强化双路径推理策略，根据查询类型动态选择纯语言演绎或3D显式接地路线，结合强化学习优化路径选择，提升空间推理准确性与灵活性。
